name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision, messages, state
CONSTANTS N, participants, FiniteSet

(* Types *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \in FiniteSet
  /\ votes \in [participants -> {"yes", "no"}]
  /\ decision \in {"commit", "abort", "none"}
  /\ messages \in FiniteSet
  /\ state \in [participants -> {"init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ participants \subseteq 1..N
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "yes"]
  /\ decision = "none"
  /\ messages = {}
  /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "init"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"] : p \in participants }
     /\ state' = state
     /\ votes' = votes
     /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants : 
        /\ state[p] = "init"
        /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes"] }
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "prepared"]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
        /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants : 
        /\ state[p] = "init"
        /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo"] }
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "prepared"]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
        /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants : 
        /\ state[p] = "prepared"
        /\ \E m \in messages : 
           /\ m.sender = "coordinator"
           /\ m.receiver = p
           /\ m.type = "Prepare"
        /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"] }
        /\ state' = state
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants : 
        /\ state[p] = "prepared"
        /\ \E m \in messages : 
           /\ m.sender = p
           /\ m.receiver = "coordinator"
           /\ m.type = "VoteYes"
        /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes"] }
        /\ state' = state
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
        /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants : 
        /\ state[p] = "prepared"
        /\ \E m \in messages : 
           /\ m.sender = p
           /\ m.receiver = "coordinator"
           /\ m.type = "VoteNo"
        /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo"] }
        /\ state' = state
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
        /\ decision' = decision
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants : 
        /\ state[p] = "prepared"
        /\ \E m \in messages : 
           /\ m.sender = "coordinator"
           /\ m.receiver = p
           /\ m.type = "Commit"
        /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"] }
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "committed"]
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decision' = "commit"
  \/ /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants : 
        /\ state[p] = "prepared"
        /\ \E m \in messages : 
           /\ m.sender = "coordinator"
           /\ m.receiver = p
           /\ m.type = "Abort"
        /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"] }
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "aborted"]
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decision' = "abort"

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ size' = size - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
         /\ head \in 0..K-1
         /\ tail \in 0..K-1
         /\ size \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> 
      /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
      \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
      \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, finished
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
        /\ channel \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
        /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
        /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ markerReceived \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ finished \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
        /\ snapshot = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
        /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ finished = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = state[i] + 1
      /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channel[i][j], state[i])]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ markerSent[i] = FALSE
      /\ markerReceived[i] = FALSE
      /\ finished[i] = FALSE
      /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, markerReceived, finished>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ markerReceived[i] = FALSE
      /\ finished[i] = FALSE
      /\ markerSent[i] = TRUE
      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, markerSent, finished>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ markerReceived[i] = TRUE
      /\ finished[i] = FALSE
      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ markerReceived[i] = TRUE
      /\ finished[i] = FALSE
      /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = state[i]]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ markerReceived[i] = TRUE
      /\ finished[i] = FALSE
      /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = <<>>]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ finished[i] = FALSE
      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ finished[i] = TRUE
      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = store
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>
